title: geum renifolium
intro: Geum renifolium, also known as the white avens, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, Geum renifolium has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Geum renifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
